case_title: C & O REALTY CORPORATION vs. MYERS, DENISE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, DENISE

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY MICHAEL ROSSOFF PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT DENISE MYERS DOES NOT APPEAR, A SETTLEMENT HAVING BEEN REACHED AT SETTLEMENT CONF PREVIOUSLY. DEFT MIGUEL ALEMAN IN PRO-PER, DOES NOT APPEAR. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT MIGUEL ALEMAN. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMNT THAT IS CONSISTENT WITH SETTLEMENT AS TO DEFT MYERS AND DEFAULT JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFT ALEMAN. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS, DENISE ALEMAN, MIGUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 GEARY STREET #44, SAN FRANCISCO $807.32 RENT, $240.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,047.32, STAYED UNTIL MAR-05-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFT ALEMAN BY DEFAULT JUDGMNT; JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFT MYERS PURS TO 2-15-96 SETTLEMENT AGREEMT. SEE JUDGMNT FOR FURTHER DETAILS. DEFT MYERS WAIVES ANY FURTHER STAYS; SEE STIPULATION FOR DETAILS.
